title: nephrodium scabrosum
intro: Nephrodium scabrosum, also known as scabrous polypody, is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium scabrosum include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. Nephrodium scabrosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
